commit_message:
fix linting errors and RTL issues fix linting errors and RTL issues Did the following fixes:

1- add `tmr_start` next state condition for the up/down mode 
2- gate pwm outputs with the enables
3- fix `tmr_dir` assignment
4- linting errors
